# Rex

> Local AI runtime: daemon owns streaming, policy, caches, and context pipeline; thin CLI/TUI clients.

## Agent entry

- [docs/AGENTS.md](docs/AGENTS.md): task router — load one doc per task
- [docs/manifest.yaml](docs/manifest.yaml): machine catalog (role, status, topics)

## Core reference

- [docs/ERROR_HANDLING.md](docs/ERROR_HANDLING.md): stable error codes and messages
- [docs/STREAM_EVENTS.md](docs/STREAM_EVENTS.md): internal stream event contract (desktop)
- [docs/CONFIGURATION.md](docs/CONFIGURATION.md): JSON config keys and precedence
- [docs/PURPOSE_AND_PRINCIPLES.md](docs/PURPOSE_AND_PRINCIPLES.md): project intent

## Architecture

- [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): system description
- [docs/MVP_SPEC.md](docs/MVP_SPEC.md): Phase 1 scope
- [docs/CONTEXT_EFFICIENCY.md](docs/CONTEXT_EFFICIENCY.md): token economics matrix

## Contributing

- [docs/DEVELOPER_EXPERIENCE_GUIDE.md](docs/DEVELOPER_EXPERIENCE_GUIDE.md): workflow and gates
- [docs/DOCUMENTATION.md](docs/DOCUMENTATION.md): writing norms

## Optional

- [docs/README.md](docs/README.md): full human index (avoid loading whole file for single tasks)
